name: Bing: Videos Search
summary: Return up to 20 video tiles from Bing Videos for one search query.
description: Run a Bing Videos search in a fresh tab and return up to 20 video cards (title, url, channel). Use for finding videos across YouTube / Vimeo / MSN and similar sources indexed by Bing. Do not use for reading news articles (`bing_news_search`) or general web results (`bing_web_search`).

steps.name: Wait for the Bing Videos search box
Extract video tiles with canonical destination URL

help.summary: Return up to 20 video tiles from Bing Videos for one search query.

examples.command: rzn-browser run bing videos-search --param search_query="claude code tutorial"
examples.description: Return up to 20 video tiles with title, url, and channel.

notes: Drives the Videos landing's real search input rather than hitting `?q=...` directly.
Bing's video grid hosts YouTube / Vimeo / MSN / native video hotlinks — follow the `url` to the real source.
